Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block

Interface MutableBlockChunk

All Superinterfaces:
BlockChunk
All Known Implementing Classes:
MutableBlockChunkImpl
@NullMarked public interface MutableBlockChunk extends BlockChunk
A mutable chunk of blocks, allowing modification of block data. Extends BlockChunk to provide methods for setting and removing blocks.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @Nullable BlockData
    removeBlock(net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.Position position)
    Removes the block at the given position.
    boolean
    setBlock(BlockPlacement placement)
    Sets a block in the chunk at the specified placement.

    Methods inherited from interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunk

    getActualPos, getAxisOrder, getBlock, getChunkPos, getMask, getPointers, getScaler, getSizeOfEntireChunk, immutable, mutable

  • Method Details

    • setBlock

      boolean setBlock(BlockPlacement placement)
      Sets a block in the chunk at the specified placement.
      Parameters:
      placement - the block placement information
      Returns:
      true if the block was set successfully, false otherwise

    • removeBlock

      @Nullable BlockData removeBlock(net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.Position position)
      Removes the block at the given position.
      Parameters:
      position - the position of the block to remove
      Returns:
      the removed BlockData, or null if no block was present
